name: ui2code
description: Select DOM elements and refine UI with AI — visual preview, screenshot comparison, and iterative fixes.

interface.shortDescription: Select elements, describe changes, let AI refine your UI.
interface.longDescription: UI2Code lets you open any dev-server page inside Codex, click to select a DOM element, describe the change you want in natural language or with a reference screenshot, and watch the AI modify your source code — then verify the result with automated screenshot comparison and iterative refinement.
